response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience and technical versatility, particularly in full-stack development, but his senior-level background and broad skill set may exceed the requirements for a junior/mid-level role. His expertise in TypeScript, React, and databases aligns well with the job, though his focus on advanced topics like AI and embedded systems may not be fully utilized in this position.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack development experience with React and Node.js.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective).
Diverse technical background with exposure to cloud services (AWS) and Kubernetes.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with senior/staff-level experience.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, though database and backend skills are present.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current remote-friendly or hybrid roles.
